language.title: Language
language.note: The app will send `Accept-Language` to the backend.
language.backendAwareDescription: Dynamic content such as course names, assignments, and lecturer notifications will be returned by the backend in the selected language. UI labels use local keys so they can later move to JSON/ARB files.
